author: Idanr
name: EMA-GPU + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff + Pre-Enrichment Confidence + XSA
blurb: EMA on GPU (64.7ms/step, 9268 steps). Multi-order n-gram backoff (2-11) with entropy-adaptive alpha + pre-enrichment confidence modulation (novel). GELU pre-enrichment + XSA-4 + SmearGate + BigramHash + int6 QAT + lzma. 10L 512d.
